gaps.title: Phase A unsealed
gaps.detail: HELM-SOAK-2H-20260714T141914Z running, PID 17876, bound e2db3278, seals 16:19:19Z. No seal_verdict.json. Cannot claim PASS.
gaps.exit_criterion: Independent evaluator emits exactly one of PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE

gaps.title: Phase B not run
gaps.detail: 8h soak. Prior Phase B seal SUPERSEDED_INVALID_INSTRUMENT (measured by the blind lease ledger).
gaps.exit_criterion: 8h clean run, negative + concurrency tests pass, filesystem/ledger reconcile

gaps.title: Phase C 24h not run
gaps.detail: Prior Phase C SUPERSEDED_MIXED_CODE (patched mid-flight, killed at 2h24m). 24h is incompressible.
gaps.exit_criterion: 24h uninterrupted, single bound commit, zero instrument drift

gaps.title: Truth reconciliation + independent seal
gaps.detail: Ledger vs physical-lock reconciliation across the full chain; hashes, manifests, chronology.
gaps.exit_criterion: No ledger/filesystem contradiction; sealed evidence package

gaps.title: Cloud cutover not started
gaps.detail: Volume mounted+persistence PROVEN. But relay authority pointer ABSENT, runtime/evidence/jspace dirs EMPTY. No MacBook-off proof.
gaps.exit_criterion: Single authoritative runtime proven with MacBook OFF; rollback proven

gaps.title: Founder DOORSTEP gate
gaps.detail: Review-only package, no technical gaps remaining.
gaps.exit_criterion: Founder approves DOORSTEP package

gaps.title: SOAK_FRESHNESS_SOURCE_STALE (false-red)
gaps.detail: /api/v1/helm/soak takes freshness from soak_config.json (written once) not scheduler_cycles.jsonl. A HEALTHY soak renders STALE.
gaps.exit_criterion: freshness = latest valid scheduler_cycles event; fallback UNKNOWN

gaps.title: hoch_pods_liftoff.html backend dead
gaps.detail: :8777 listens (live-truth-sidecar, pid 858) and serves / but /api/live returns 000. That UI is NOT updating.
gaps.exit_criterion: /api/live returns 200 OR the UI is formally retired

gaps.title: pert/founder/helm UIs not browser-proven
gaps.detail: Only console.html is browser-proven (4/4 DOM). The other three have live backends (200) but a 200 is not proof the DOM ticks or fails closed.
gaps.exit_criterion: Playwright proof: API-dead=>UNKNOWN, stale=>STALE, contradiction=>CONTRADICTED

gaps.title: API bound 127.0.0.1 — no phone/Tailscale access
gaps.detail: helm_live_api started with --host 127.0.0.1. Founder dashboard unreachable from iPhone.
gaps.exit_criterion: Bound behind Tailscale, reachable from phone, not publicly exposed

gaps.title: frontend_live/HELM.html overlaps console.html
gaps.detail: 18.5KB pre-existing HELM.html was NOT overwritten (I refused to destroy unreviewed work). Two candidate canonical consoles now exist.
gaps.exit_criterion: One canonical console; the other reconciled or formally retired

gaps.title: Full test suite NOT run
gaps.detail: 88 test files exist in tests/. I have run only 3 (jspace_hjos, jspace_governance, lease_release_truth). The other ~85 are UNVERIFIED against current HEAD.
gaps.exit_criterion: Full suite green against the sealed commit, or every failure triaged

gaps.title: Historical 199.5h burn-in cannot substitute
gaps.detail: It predates the release-lease honesty fix, filesystem reconciliation, J-SPACE governance correction and commit-bound soak identity. It is not evidence for the current chain.
gaps.exit_criterion: Explicitly excluded from the closure evidence set

gaps.title: J-SPACE adversarial/negative tests incomplete
gaps.detail: 19 tests pass (governance fail-closed, read-only, historical immutability). Missing: daemon duplicate-prevention, stale-PID recovery, cycle timeout, invalid-policy fail-closed, missing-ledger fail-closed, rollback byte-exactness.
gaps.exit_criterion: Full negative battery from the audit directive

gaps.title: Working tree dirty (71 files)
gaps.detail: Runtime ledger churn + untracked artifacts. Auditability requires a clean, commit-bound tree at seal time.
gaps.exit_criterion: Clean tree or every dirty file classified as expected runtime churn

gaps.title: 31 launchd agents loaded, unclassified
gaps.detail: 31 hoch agents loaded (63 plists on disk). Process contention, duplicate telemetry, ambiguous ownership, hard incident attribution. NOT respawning the soak (verified) — but unclassified.
gaps.exit_criterion: Every agent classified AUTHORITATIVE/SUPPORTING/LEGACY/DUPLICATE/UNKNOWN/SAFE_TO_DISABLE/FOUNDER_REVIEW. No mass deletion.
gaps.remediation: POST-SEAL (do not alter during the active run)

gaps.title: HJOS daemon supervision ungoverned
gaps.detail: Runs under nohup with a /tmp pidfile. No single-instance lock, no stale-PID recovery, no health endpoint, no last-success/last-failure, no bounded log rotation, log in /tmp.
gaps.exit_criterion: Repo-owned launchd definition + single-instance lock + health endpoint

gaps.title: HJOS has no authorizing_policy_id
gaps.detail: authorizing_policy_id=null, auto_quarantine=false, orphan_hygiene=manual_approval. Fail-closed and SAFE. This is the correct default; no action is REQUIRED.
gaps.exit_criterion: Founder either grants a policy id or affirms read-only permanently

gaps.title: Revenue NOT PROVEN
gaps.detail: SETTLED=$0.00, PENDING=$18.10 (1 row). Epic Fury is PACKAGED. Not SUBMITTED, not AVAILABLE, not PAYMENT_ENABLED, not REVENUE_PROVEN.
gaps.exit_criterion: External payment received and SETTLED in the ledger
gaps.note: INDEPENDENT OF HELM CERTIFICATION. This does not need Phase A/B/C to advance.

gaps.title: North Star metric UNDEFINED
gaps.detail: verified_founder_minutes_per_shipped_dollar requires SETTLED dollars. SETTLED=$0 => denominator zero => metric UNDEFINED, not zero.
gaps.exit_criterion: First SETTLED dollar makes the North Star computable
